title: S12: Anthropic Provider — Real Implementation via Kernel Adapters
intent: Replace the DEV STUB executeLlmInfer with a real implementation that calls the Anthropic Messages API. API key retrieved via SecretsAdapter, HTTP call via NetworkAdapter (Uint8Array encode/decode). Explicit error handling for non-2xx responses. No direct HTTP imports — all I/O through kernel adapters. Include 14 unit tests covering manifest, adapter delegation, request construction, response parsing, and error paths.
acceptance_criteria: [MIGRATION] Define acceptance criteria for this packet
